description_long: This is a modern office building characterized by a rectangular, blocky form and a flat roof with various rooftop structures, including HVAC units and a wooden deck area. The facade features horizontal bands of dark-tinted windows separated by prominent concrete or metal spandrels, creating a layered appearance. The building has a symmetrical design, with the front and rear elevations showcasing a central recessed section flanked by projecting wings. The ground floor includes a main entrance with a recessed entryway, likely providing access to a lobby. The exterior is finished in shades of gray, with a mix of smooth and matte surfaces, and the windows are arranged in a regular, repetitive pattern. The overall style is utilitarian and functional, with minimal ornamentation, reflecting a contemporary or late-20th-century architectural approach.
description: A modern, rectangular office building with horizontal bands of dark windows, a flat roof featuring rooftop structures, and a prominent recessed main entrance. The facade is finished in shades of gray with a layered, symmetrical design.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main recessed entrance, layered facade, and rooftop structures.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the long horizontal bands of windows and the full extent of the rooftop deck and equipment.
description_view_2: Rear view mirroring the front, with a central recessed section and visible rooftop installations.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, again showing the horizontal window bands and rooftop features, with a clear view of the deck area.
attribute_window_pattern: Regular horizontal bands of rectangular windows separated by thick spandrels, repeated uniformly across each floor.
